title: Spicy Kalguksu Noodle Bowl
description: A Korean-inspired noodle bowl made with homemade kalguksu noodles and topped with spicy sauce, juicy chicken, and sesame seeds.
instructions: Bring the icy cold water to a boil and then reduce to a simmer.
Add the kalguksu noodles to the water and cook until al dente, about 5-7 minutes.
While the noodles are cooking, grill the chicken breast until cooked through.
In a small saucepan, combine the korean chili flakes, soy sauce, brown sugar, and sesame oil.
Bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Once the noodles are done, drain them and add them to a bowl with the sliced grilled chicken.
Pour the spicy sauce over the noodles and chicken.
Top with sesame seeds and green onions.
